description_long: This stereo sound system features a central rectangular unit with a sleek black finish and wood-textured accents, flanked by two large, circular speakers on either side. The speakers have a dark, concentric ring design, suggesting a layered construction with a visible central dome. The main body includes a top section with a grid-like structure, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic effect, and a front panel that appears solid and unadorned. The side views reveal cylindrical supports connecting the speakers to the main unit, with the speakers extending outward. The overall design is modern, with a combination of metal, wood, and synthetic materials, giving it a robust and stylish appearance. This sound system would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as parks, garages, or public gathering spaces.
description: A modern stereo sound system with a black and wood finish, featuring two large circular speakers and a central rectangular unit with a grid-like top. The design is sleek and robust, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central unit with a grid top and both large circular speakers fully visible on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central unit and the cylindrical supports connecting the speakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel of the main unit and the backs of the circular speakers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the structure and connection of the speakers to the main body.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Concentric ring pattern with a central dome, likely a mesh or perforated synthetic material.
attribute_control_panel_layout: No visible control panel; the front and top surfaces appear unadorned.
